title: claude.* (native CC event envelope)
description: Every stream-json line from `claude -p` is forwarded with its native `type` prefixed by `claude.` (e.g. `claude.system`, `claude.stream_event`, `claude.assistant`, `claude.user`, `claude.result`, `claude.partial_assistant`), plus daemon-injected `session_id` and `seq`. The inner payload (`message`, `event`, `result`, …) passes through unchanged and is intentionally not constrained here — CC owns that schema.
